data.title: OpenText Among First Canadian Companies to Join OECD Global Safe AI Reporting Framework
data.description: On May 29, 2026, in Waterloo, Ontario, OpenText™, a prominent company specializing in enterprise AI data management, announced its participation in the OECD's Hiroshima AI Process (HAIP) Reporting Framework. This framework serves as an international platform for organizations to showcase their adherence to the G7's guidelines on AI. OpenText™, traded on NASDAQ and TSX under the symbol OTEX, is recognized worldwide for its innovative solutions in the field of data management.

data.title: Duke Energy Florida implements third rate reduction to lower residential customer bills by approximately 25% in 2026
data.description: A utility company in St. Petersburg, Florida, Duke Energy Florida, is set to introduce its third rate cut of 2026 starting in June until September. This reduction will result in a decrease of around $50, corresponding to a 25% drop, for every 1,000 kilowatt-hours (kWh) consumed by residential customers.

data.title: Companies, including those in Malta and Cyprus, avoided $40B in taxes since 2025 under new rules approved by Trump.
data.description: Since the start of 2025, American corporations have avoided paying a minimum of $40 billion in taxes through utilizing tax evasion strategies in nations such as Malta, Bermuda, and Cyprus.

data.title: PEARL HARBOR AVIATION MUSEUM SALUTES BOB HOPE ON HIS 123rd BIRTHDAY and 85TH ANNIVERSARY MONTH OF HIS FIRST PERFORMANCE FOR A MILITARY AUDIENCE
data.description: Colorized photos capturing the historic day of Bob Hope's inaugural broadcast to the troops in May 1941 are showcased, along with an audio link to the Pepsodent radio show from that event. The Pearl Harbor Aviation Museum in Honolulu celebrated Bob Hope's 123rd birthday with a tribute.

data.title: Stellar's XLM surges over 50% as Stellar Network and DTCC announce partnership, but downside risk looms.
data.description: The cryptocurrency XLM experienced a significant surge in value following the announcement of a collaboration between the US-based financial institution DTCC and the Stellar Network. Despite this positive development, experts suggest that XLM remains susceptible to a notable decline in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: ICE's CEO advocates for fair regulation of 24/7 onchain perps to support trading on platforms like Hyperliquid.
data.description: The CEO of ICE emphasized the importance of regulatory authorities establishing a fair environment for introducing onchain perpetual contracts that operate around the clock. These contracts are currently being traded on platforms like Hyperliquid.

data.title: Roberto Cavalli Global Restructuring: Marquee Brands and The Level Group Lead the Strategic Acquisition of the Italian Luxury Brand
data.description: Marquee Brands, a U.S. company focused on acquiring, managing, and growing a diverse range of global consumer lifestyle brands, has collaborated with The Level Group to acquire control of the Roberto Cavalli brand. The deal, part of a strategic reorganization of the group, was finalized with DAMAC Group, a multinational conglomerate based in Dubai. The agreement involves a binding partnership to take over the brand's operations, with TLG serving as the main operating partner. This move represents a significant development in Marquee Brands' expansion strategy, demonstrating their commitment to diversifying their brand portfolio.

data.title: Kalshi Launches First-Ever Perpetual Futures in America
data.description: In a recent announcement, Kalshi introduced perpetual futures contracts, marking a significant milestone as the first company in the United States to offer such a product. This launch expands Kalshi's product offerings and allows U.S. investors to trade crypto perpetual futures on their platform. The contracts are fully regulated by the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), providing investors with a secure trading environment. This marks a notable product expansion for Kalshi, following the introduction of event contracts, emphasizing the company's commitment to innovation and diversity in the financial market.

data.title: Pinnacle Mergers & Acquisitions Facilitates Sale of Ferrari of Denver in Colorado
data.description: Recently, the Ferrari dealership in Denver changed ownership as Lithia Motors sold it to Jason Pittack of the Woodhouse Auto Family. The seller was represented by Pinnacle Mergers & Acquisitions in the deal. This shift occurred in Southlake, Texas, on May 29, 2026. Pinnacle Mergers & Acquisitions, a prominent player in the automotive dealership industry, facilitated the transaction.

data.title: HelloNation Highlights Bowling Green as a Finalist for the National Civic League's 2026 All-America City Award
data.description: An analysis of Bowling Green's civic involvement strategies, programs for young leaders, and community-based planning endeavors is detailed in the report. The city of BOWLING GREEN in Kentucky saw these efforts being highlighted on May 29, 2026. The discussion revolves around the concept of inclusive civic engagement in a swiftly expanding American urban area.

data.title: The Last Mile Retail Awards Celebrates Retail & Last Mile Excellence in Nashville
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee on May 28, 2026, the 2026 Last Mile Retail Awards (LMRA) were held in collaboration with Home Delivery World. This event brought together top retailers, logistics experts, and industry pioneers to commemorate excellence in customer service.

data.title: DigitalOcean to Participate in Bank of America Global Technology Conference 2026
data.description: BROOMFIELD, Colo.-- DigitalOcean Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DOCN) revealed that CFO Matt Steinfort and SVP of Corporate Development and Investor Relations Radu Patrichi will engage in a fireside chat at the Bank of America Global Technology Conference on June 3 at 2:00 p.m. (PT) / 5:00 p.m. (ET). Interested individuals can access the live webcast at https://bofa.veracast.com/webcasts/bofa/.
